title: Katyayani Chalisa
intro: Shri Katyayani Chalisa: Full Path, Meaning, and Benefits - Hymn to Goddess Katyayani
description:
|| Shri Katyayani Chalisa ||

|| Doha ||
Naman karon jai Katyayani, mamtamayi Bhavani.
Karuna kripa sadaiv karen, sabki ho sukhdhani.

|| Chaupai ||
Jai Katyayani maa Bhavani, shakti swarupa jagat niyani.
Mahishasur mardini mata, karunamayi ho bhakti data.
Katyayani maa shuchi savari, simha vahini tej tumhari.
Trishuldharini maha mai, raktadantika tuhi sukhdai.
Durga ka yeh chhathvan roop, Katyayani maa ki anoop.
Rishi Katyayan ke ghar aai, unke ghar mein janmi pai.
Mahishasur ke vadh ke karan, Katyayani ban gai haran.
Shatru sanharini maa Bhavani, Katyayani jai jagat janani.
Tripurari ki ho pyari, Katyayani maa sukhkari.
Krishna janm jab hua dharadham, Gopiyon ne kiya naam.
Katyayani vrat ko apnaya, Krishna ko pati roop mein paya.
Brahmacharini swaroop dikhaya, Katyayani naam tab paya.
Jo bhi mata dhyan lagaye, Katyayani sab kasht mitaye.
Bhakti bhav se jo gun gaye, sab sankaton se mukt ho jaye.
Durgam karya sadhave mata, vighn badha mitave data.
Katyayani ki jo sharan mein jaye, jeevan mein sukh shanti paye.
Sankat harti Katyayani maa, shraddha se jo kare prarthana.
Shakti swarupa maa sukhkari, bhakton ki har vipatti hari.
Maa ki mahima bad sukhdai, har kashton ko harne wali.
Katyayani chalisa jo gaye, sab kashton se mukti paye.

|| Doha ||
Naman karon jai Katyayani, mamtamayi Bhavani.
Karuna kripa sadaiv karen, sabki ho sukhdhani.
meaning:
|| Shri Katyayani Chalisa ||

|| Doha ||
Naman karon jai Katyayani,
(I bow to victory to Mother Katyayani)
Mamtamayi Bhavani.
(You are the Motherly Goddess Bhavani)
Karuna kripa sadaiv karen,
(Always bestow mercy and grace)
Sabki ho sukhdhani.
(You are the abode of happiness for all)

|| Chaupai ||
Jai Katyayani maa Bhavani,
(Victory to Mother Katyayani Bhavani)
Shakti swarupa jagat niyani.
(You are the embodiment of power and the ruler of the world)
Mahishasur mardini mata,
(Mother, the destroyer of Mahishasura)
Karunamayi ho bhakti data.
(You are compassionate and the giver of devotion)
Katyayani maa shuchi savari,
(Mother Katyayani, your vehicle is pure)
Simha vahini tej tumhari.
(You are the lion-rider with radiant brilliance)
Trishuldharini maha mai,
(The great Mother who holds the trident)
Raktadantika tuhi sukhdai.
(You are Raktadantika, the bestower of happiness)
Durga ka yeh chhathvan roop,
(This is the sixth form of Durga)
Katyayani maa ki anoop.
(Mother Katyayani's incomparable form)
Rishi Katyayan ke ghar aai,
(You came to the house of Sage Katyayan)
Unke ghar mein janmi pai.
(And were born in his home)
Mahishasur ke vadh ke karan,
(For the slaying of Mahishasura)
Katyayani ban gai haran.
(You became known as Katyayani)
Shatru sanharini maa Bhavani,
(Destroyer of enemies, Mother Bhavani)
Katyayani jai jagat janani.
(Victory to Katyayani, the Mother of the world)
Tripurari ki ho pyari,
(You are beloved to Tripurari - Shiva)
Katyayani maa sukhkari.
(Mother Katyayani, the giver of happiness)
Krishna janm jab hua dharadham,
(When Krishna was born on earth)
Gopiyon ne kiya naam.
(The Gopis called upon your name)
Katyayani vrat ko apnaya,
(They observed the Katyayani fast)
Krishna ko pati roop mein paya.
(And attained Krishna as their husband)
Brahmacharini swaroop dikhaya,
(You showed the Brahmacharini form)
Katyayani naam tab paya.
(And then attained the name Katyayani)
Jo bhi mata dhyan lagaye,
(Whoever meditates on the Mother)
Katyayani sab kasht mitaye.
(Katyayani removes all their troubles)
Bhakti bhav se jo gun gaye,
(Whoever sings your praises with devotion)
Sab sankaton se mukt ho jaye.
(Becomes free from all crises)
Durgam karya sadhave mata,
(Mother, you accomplish difficult tasks)
Vighn badha mitave data.
(And remove obstacles, O Giver)
Katyayani ki jo sharan mein jaye,
(Whoever seeks the refuge of Katyayani)
Jeevan mein sukh shanti paye.
(Finds happiness and peace in life)
Sankat harti Katyayani maa,
(Mother Katyayani removes troubles)
Shraddha se jo kare prarthana.
(For those who pray with faith)
Shakti swarupa maa sukhkari,
(The embodiment of power, Mother, the giver of happiness)
Bhakton ki har vipatti hari.
(You remove all miseries of devotees)
Maa ki mahima bad sukhdai,
(Mother's glory is very blissful)
Har kashton ko harne wali.
(You are the remover of all sufferings)
Katyayani chalisa jo gaye,
(Whoever sings the Katyayani Chalisa)
Sab kashton se mukti paye.
(Attains liberation from all sufferings)

|| Doha ||
Naman karon jai Katyayani,
(I bow to victory to Mother Katyayani)
Mamtamayi Bhavani.
(You are the Motherly Goddess Bhavani)
Karuna kripa sadaiv karen,
(Always bestow mercy and grace)
Sabki ho sukhdhani.
(You are the abode of happiness for all)

faq.a1: Maa Durga was born as the daughter of Sage Katyayana, who performed rigorous penance to have her as his daughter. Hence, she is named 'Katyayani.'
faq.q2: What is the main benefit of worshiping her?
faq.a2: Maa Katyayani is often referred to as the 'Goddess of Marriage.' Girls facing delays or obstacles in marriage worship her for blessings for a suitable match. She is also worshiped for success in one's career.
faq.q3: When is the auspicious day to worship her?
faq.a3: The sixth day of Navratri (Shasthi) is dedicated to Maa Katyayani.
faq.q4: What is the appropriate offering (Bhog) for her?
faq.a4: Honey is considered the favorite offering for Maa Katyayani. It is believed that offering honey brings sweetness into one's life.
faq.q5: What is the nature of her form?
faq.a5: Maa Katyayani represents a fierce, warrior form of the Goddess. She is the destroyer of demons and the ultimate protector of her devotees.
